Venue Info
Media Gallery
Thomas M. Ryan Center (University of Rhode Island)
Kingston, RI
Seating Capacity: 7571
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 1
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
03.20.03 - Dancing Nancies (7:56)
Description
The University of Rhode Island opened the doors to the $54 million, 7,571-seat Thomas M. Ryan Center in June of 2002.
